response: This code performs the **fixup phase of Red-Black Tree insertion**, restoring the tree's balance properties after inserting a new node by recoloring nodes and performing rotations to eliminate red-red parent-child violations. It handles three cases: when the uncle is red (recolor), when the uncle is black and the node is a right child (left rotate then recolor), and when the uncle is black and the node is a left child (recolor then right rotate).
